## [00:00 - 03:00]

Hey, you're going to love this case study with Cara. Think about having a blog where you're publishing it and you're building a following, but you're not making any money whatsoever. And then you get Product Launch Formula and you do a launch and you make $90,000 and you're able to buy your first home. Check it out. You're going to love this. Hi, Jeff and Team Walker. My name is Cara Andretta. I own Cara's Couture Cakes and Pro Cake University and I'm located in Buffalo, New York. My overall experience with PLF has been positively transformative and I know we throw that word around a lot because it's so important. But PLF lived up to that promise for me. I worked the system. I worked the product. I worked the formula and I gave up and surrendered any of the, it can't work in my niche and I just worked it and it worked for me. My business has boomed ever since. I've become a powerhouse when it comes to the more important portion of teaching the cake community, which is the business side of the cake community. I have a huge social media following. I had a good one before. I have an even better one now. I have opportunities rolling in left and right, including book publishing and even more than that, I'm able to influence and impact others by being able to reach people. I impact my family because we can finally breathe financially. We bought a house thanks to our $91,000 launch in April of 2016 and I see other people's businesses and lives flourishing because of what I've been able to bring to them and I was only able to reach them through understanding online marketing in such an incredible way. Before product launch formula, my life was frustrating and suffocating and it seemed like a dead end. I felt like that U2 song, Running to Stand Still, I felt like my husband and I were just running to stand still at a breakneck pace and even sliding backwards most of the time. But since I started this journey with PLF, my life today is incredible. It's something I never imagined could actually happen. We bought a house because of that one launch. My boys have a backyard to grow up in and play in and I feel like I've finally provided my side for the family as well as helped other people provide for theirs and nourish something within their own creative souls. My husband hopefully by 2017 is going to be able to quit his job at a retail store and come work for me at home if he wants to. If he wants to, I'll be able to finally start repaying my student loans and I'm seeing what
